reason: This finding involves configuring the PAM password retry parameter in /etc/security/pwquality.conf, a standard STIG hardening practice for authentication. The change is unlikely to cause system breakage or lockout when applied correctly, as it follows established security guidelines for password policy enforcement.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; filesystems affected; Potential for user login disruption if retry value is set too low; Requires validation to ensure password policies align with organizational requirements
